COMMON.NAME: Name
COMMON.API_REQUEST_FAILED: We could not complete the request. Please try again.

API_ERRORS.PASSWORD_RESET_INVALID: Invalid or expired reset link. Please request a new one from the login page.
API_ERRORS.PASSWORD_RESET_NOT_CONFIGURED: Password reset is unavailable: the public app URL is not configured on the server. Ask an administrator to set PUBLIC_APP_BASE_URL (and SMTP) in the deployment environment.
API_ERRORS.ACTOR_CURRENT_PASSWORD_REQUIRED: Enter your current password to change a user's password.
API_ERRORS.RESERVATION_SEATING_FLOOR_MISMATCH: This seating area does not match the selected seating preference.
API_ERRORS.RESERVATION_DATE_TOO_FAR: Reservation date cannot be more than 12 months in advance.
API_ERRORS.RESERVATION_MIN_LEAD_TIME: Reservation must be at least {{minutes}} minutes from now.
API_ERRORS.RESERVATION_INVALID_SEATING_AREA: Invalid seating area for this restaurant.
API_ERRORS.RESERVATION_SEATING_NO_MATCHING_ZONE: No seating area matches this preference. Try another seating option or contact the restaurant.
API_ERRORS.TABLE_HAS_ORDERS: Cannot delete this table: it has orders. Reassign to another table or close orders first.
API_ERRORS.REASSIGN_TARGET_MUST_DIFFER: Reassign target must be a different table.
API_ERRORS.DATABASE_ERROR: A database error occurred. Please try again later.
API_ERRORS.RESERVATION_DATE_MUST_BE_TODAY_OR_FUTURE: Reservation date must be today or in the future.
API_ERRORS.RESERVATION_TIME_MUST_BE_FUTURE: Reservation time must be in the future.
API_ERRORS.OTP_SESSION_EXPIRED: Invalid or expired OTP session. Please log in again.
API_ERRORS.TENANT_ID_REQUIRED_FOR_BOOKING: Restaurant ID is required for public booking.
API_ERRORS.INVALID_IMPORT_JSON: Invalid import JSON. Use {"items":[...]} or an array of products.
API_ERRORS.IMPORT_NO_VALID_ROWS: No valid rows to save. Fix errors in the preview first.
API_ERRORS.PRODUCT_VISION_NOT_CONFIGURED: Menu photo extraction is not configured on this server.
API_ERRORS.PRODUCT_VISION_API_FAILED: Vision API request failed. Try again or use JSON import.
API_ERRORS.PRODUCT_VISION_PARSE_FAILED: Could not read menu items from the API response.
API_ERRORS.VISION_NO_ITEMS_FOUND: No menu items with prices were found in the image.
API_ERRORS.VISION_INVALID_IMAGE_TYPE: Invalid image type. Use JPEG, PNG, WebP, or AVIF.

DOC.NOT_LEGAL_ADVICE: This information supports transparency and third-party integrations (for example OAuth). It does not replace legal advice. The operator should have final texts reviewed by qualified counsel.
DOC.TOS_INTRO: These terms govern use of the Satisfecho service (satisfecho.de and related apps). Restaurants configure their own offerings; guests and staff use the product under these rules and any notices shown in the interface.
DOC.TOS_S1_BODY: Satisfecho is a cloud platform for restaurants: reservations, guest ordering, staff workflows, optional payment integrations, and related features. Availability and behaviour depend on configuration, maintenance, and third-party providers.
DOC.TOS_S2_BODY: You must provide accurate registration data and keep credentials confidential. You are responsible for activity under your account. We may suspend access if we reasonably believe there is misuse, risk to others, or a legal obligation.
DOC.TOS_S3_BODY: You may not use the service unlawfully, to harass others, to overload or attack systems, to scrape without permission, or to circumvent security or usage limits. Restaurants remain responsible for their guest-facing practices that comply with applicable law.
DOC.TOS_S4_BODY: The product may connect to payment, messaging, maps, analytics, or login providers. Those services have their own terms. We are not responsible for third-party failures beyond what mandatory law requires.
DOC.TOS_S5_BODY: To the extent permitted by law, the service is provided as available. We do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free operation. Liability for slight negligence, indirect damages, or loss of profit is excluded except where such exclusion is void under mandatory consumer or product law.
DOC.TOS_S6_BODY: We may update these terms or the service. Material changes will be reflected on this page with an updated date. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance unless applicable law requires additional steps.
DOC.PRIVACY_INTRO: This policy describes how personal data is processed when you use Satisfecho (satisfecho.de). The operator of the platform (together with each restaurant using the product) processes data as explained below. Restaurants may add their own notices for guest-facing flows.
DOC.PRIVACY_S1_BODY: The technical operator processes data required to run the platform. Each restaurant is typically responsible for guest and staff data it enters and for its own legal bases (for example contract performance for reservations). For questions about a specific booking, contact the restaurant first; for platform-wide issues, use the contact details published on satisfecho.de.
DOC.PRIVACY_S2_BODY: We may process account data (name, email, organisation), reservation and order details, payment-related metadata when payments are used, communications sent through the product, feedback you submit, and technical data (IP address, device/browser type, timestamps, logs) for security and reliability.
DOC.PRIVACY_S3_BODY: Data is used to provide and improve the service, authenticate users, prevent abuse, comply with law, and send transactional messages (for example reservation confirmations) where configured. Legal bases may include contract (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR), legitimate interests such as IT security (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR), and consent where required (Art. 6(1)(a) GDPR).
DOC.PRIVACY_S4_BODY: We keep data only as long as needed for the purposes above, statutory retention periods, or legitimate claims. Restaurants may configure their own retention for operational records. Technical logs are rotated on a limited schedule.
DOC.PRIVACY_S5_BODY: We use processors (for example hosting, email delivery, payment providers) under agreements that require appropriate safeguards. If data is processed outside the EEA, we rely on adequacy decisions or standard contractual clauses where required.
DOC.PRIVACY_S6_BODY: Under the GDPR you may have the right to access, rectification, erasure, restriction, portability, and objection, and to lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority. To exercise rights against a restaurant, contact that restaurant. For platform processing, contact the operator using the published contact channel.
DOC.PRIVACY_S7_BODY: We may update this policy when our practices change. The date at the top indicates the latest revision. Significant changes will be communicated where appropriate.

LANDING.TITLE: Your restaurant, connected
LANDING.SUBTITLE: Guests book and order at the table; teams run service from one place.
LANDING.VALUE_DINE_IN: Order from your seat with a table code
LANDING.VALUE_STAFF: Dashboard and tools for your team
LANDING.SECTION_GUESTS_LEDE: Already seated? Enter your table name or open the link from the QR code on your table.
LANDING.AT_TABLE_HINT: Already at a table? Enter the name on your table (e.g. T01) or use the link from your table's QR code.
LANDING.TABLE_NOT_FOUND: No table found. Check the name on your table or scan the QR code.
LANDING.TABLE_MULTIPLE_HINT: More than one restaurant uses this table name. Choose yours.
LANDING.TABLE_LOOKUP_FAILED: Could not look up the table. Try again.
LANDING.OPEN_SOURCE_TAGLINE: Open source with ♥ from El Masnou (Barcelona) & Los Mochis (Mexico).

DASHBOARD.WELCOME_TEXT: Manage your business operations from here
DASHBOARD.BEVERAGES_DESC: Orders view for bar and drinks
DASHBOARD.WORKING_PLAN_DESC: Shift schedule for kitchen, bar and waiters

DASHBOARD.MY_SHIFT_DESC_ON: You are clocked in — open to clock out or view history

AUTH.LOGIN_FAILED: Sign-in failed. Check your details and try again.
AUTH.LOGIN_RATE_LIMITED: Too many login attempts. Please try again later.
AUTH.REGISTER_FOR_PROVIDERS: Restaurant and business owners. Create your restaurant here to get your own staff dashboard, manage orders, tables, and reservations.
AUTH.REGISTER_GUEST_HINT: Just want to book a table or order at a restaurant? You don't need an account — use «Book a table» or the table name / QR field on the homepage.
AUTH.OTP_ENTER_CODE: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
AUTH.FORGOT_DESC: Enter your email address and we will send you a link to choose a new password.
AUTH.RESET_EMAIL_SENT: If an account exists for this email, you will receive instructions shortly.
AUTH.RESET_PASSWORD_DESC: Enter a strong password (at least 8 characters) that you have not reused elsewhere for this account.
AUTH.RESET_SUCCESS: Your password was updated. You can sign in now.
AUTH.RESET_TOKEN_MISSING: This reset link is missing or invalid. Request a new reset from the login page.

MENU.TITLE: Menu
MENU.ITEMS_ADDED_TO_ORDER: Order received! Items added to Order #{{orderId}}
MENU.NO_ACTIVE_ORDER_HINT: Add items from the menu below and place your order.
MENU.PIN_HINT: Ask your server for the 4-digit PIN
MENU.TABLE_CLOSED_MESSAGE: This table is not currently accepting orders. Please ask a member of staff for assistance.

PRODUCTS.TITLE: Products
PRODUCTS.FILL_REQUIRED_FIELDS: Please fill in product name and price.
PRODUCTS.PRICE_REQUIRED: Please enter a valid price (greater than 0).
PRODUCTS.TAX_OVERRIDE_HINT: Override the default tax for this product. Leave as default to use the tax set in Settings.
PRODUCTS.KITCHEN_STATION_HINT: Shown on kitchen or bar display by station when your restaurant uses prep stations in Settings.
PRODUCTS.AVAILABLE_FROM_HINT: Customer menu shows this product only from this date. Leave empty for no start limit.
PRODUCTS.AVAILABLE_UNTIL_HINT: Customer menu shows this product only until this date. Leave empty for no end limit.
PRODUCTS.NO_PRODUCTS_DESC: Add your first product to get started
PRODUCTS.COST_HINT: Used to calculate profit in reports.
PRODUCTS.DELETE_PRODUCT_CONFIRM: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"
PRODUCTS.DELETE_ALL_CONFIRM: This permanently removes all {{count}} products for this restaurant. This cannot be undone.
PRODUCTS.PRODUCT_CREATED_BUT_IMAGE_FAILED: Product created but image upload failed
PRODUCTS.SELECT_CATEGORY_TO_MANAGE: Select a category to manage its subcategories
PRODUCTS.NO_SUBCATEGORIES_FOUND: No subcategories found for this category.
PRODUCTS.SEARCH_PLACEHOLDER: Search products by name, ingredients, category…
PRODUCTS.DELETE_SUBCATEGORY_CONFIRM: Are you sure you want to delete the subcategory '{{name}}'? Products in this subcategory will be left without a subcategory.
PRODUCTS.CUSTOMIZATIONS_HINT: Optional questions guests answer before adding this item to the cart (e.g. doneness, spice level). Shown on the table menu.
PRODUCTS.CUSTOMIZATIONS_AFTER_SAVE: Save the product first, then edit it again to add customization questions.
PRODUCTS.QUESTION_LABEL_PLACEHOLDER: e.g. How would you like your steak cooked?
PRODUCTS.QUESTION_CHOICE_MULTI: Allow multiple selections (e.g. several toppings or removals)
PRODUCTS.QUESTION_OPTIONS_REQUIRED: Add at least one option (one per line).
PRODUCTS.QUESTION_SCALE_INVALID: Maximum must be greater than minimum.
PRODUCTS.QUESTION_DELETE_CONFIRM: Remove customization "{{label}}"? Existing orders keep their saved answers.
PRODUCTS.BULK_IMPORT_TITLE: Import products from JSON or menu photo
PRODUCTS.BULK_IMPORT_LEDE: Review every row before saving. Nothing is published until you confirm.
PRODUCTS.BULK_IMPORT_JSON_HINT: Each item needs a name and price (price or price_cents). Category and subcategory are optional.
PRODUCTS.BULK_IMPORT_PRIVACY_BODY: Menu photos are sent to the configured vision API to extract dish names and prices. Images are not stored on our servers. Review and edit the preview before anything is saved to your menu.
PRODUCTS.BULK_IMPORT_VISION_UNAVAILABLE: Menu photo extraction is not configured on this server (PRODUCT_VISION_API_KEY). Use JSON import instead.
PRODUCTS.BULK_IMPORT_SUMMARY: {{valid}} of {{total}} rows ready ({{create}} new, {{update}} updates, {{invalid}} with errors).
PRODUCTS.BULK_IMPORT_REVIEW_HINT: Edit rows below, then confirm to save valid items only.
PRODUCTS.BULK_IMPORT_COST_INVALID: Cost must be zero or greater.
PRODUCTS.BULK_IMPORT_JSON_INVALID: Invalid JSON. Use {"items":[...]} or a raw array.

ORDERS.NO_ORDERS_DESC: Orders will appear here when customers place them
ORDERS.FOCUS_TABLE_NO_ORDERS: No orders found for this table.

ORDERS.DELETE_ORDER_CONFIRM: Remove this order from the list and from book-keeping (reports)? It will no longer appear anywhere. This cannot be undone.
ORDERS.NO_UNPAID_ORDERS: No unpaid orders at this time
ORDERS.FINISH_ORDER_HELP: Every item is marked as served and the order is closed as paid in one step.

ORDERS.PAY_NOW_HELP: Payment is recorded now. Line items keep their current kitchen status until you mark them served or use Finish.
ORDERS.OVERPAYMENT_PAYMENT_HINT: Enter the total charged on the terminal. Tip defaults to the amount over the subtotal; edit the tip if needed, then confirm.
ORDERS.OVERPAYMENT_VALIDATE: Amount charged must cover the subtotal plus tip.
ORDERS.REMOVE_ITEM_CONFIRM: Are you sure you want to remove this item?
ORDERS.CANCELLATION_REASON: Reason for cancellation (required for tax reporting):
ORDERS.REASON_REQUIRED: Reason is required when canceling ready items
ORDERS.REMOVAL_REASON: Reason for removal (required for audit and tax when removing ready/delivered items):
ORDERS.REMOVAL_REASON_REQUIRED: Reason is required when removing ready or delivered items
ORDERS.FAILED_TO_MARK_PAID: Failed to mark order as paid
ORDERS.INVOICE_OSS_PREFIX: Open source · Made with ♥ in Barcelona and Mexico
ORDERS.FISCAL_ISSUE_FAILED: Could not issue fiscal invoice. The order may need to be paid first.

KITCHEN_DISPLAY.TITLE: Kitchen display
KITCHEN_DISPLAY.NO_ACTIVE_ORDERS_DESC: New orders will appear here when customers place them
KITCHEN_DISPLAY.TIMER_SETTINGS_DESC: Order card color changes after these minutes (green → yellow → orange → red).
KITCHEN_DISPLAY.TIMER_BAR_HINT: Wait time progress toward red threshold

MY_SHIFT.TITLE: My shift
MY_SHIFT.SUBTITLE: Clock in when you start work at the venue and clock out when you leave. Times are stored for payroll and reports.
MY_SHIFT.AUDIT_HINT: Each clock-in and clock-out records the network address seen by the server (e.g. restaurant Wi‑Fi vs home). This does not prove physical presence by itself, but helps spot unusual patterns.
MY_SHIFT.NO_HISTORY: No sessions in the last 30 days.
MY_SHIFT.QR_HINT: Use Scan venue QR below, or open the staff link from your manager. Clock-in must be tied to this restaurant.
MY_SHIFT.SCANNER_HELP: Allow camera access, then point at the QR code posted at the venue.
MY_SHIFT.SCANNER_CAMERA_ERROR: Could not access the camera. Allow camera permission and try again.
MY_SHIFT.SCAN_INVALID: That code is not a valid venue clock QR. Ask your manager for the correct code.
MY_SHIFT.VENUE_VERIFIED: Venue verified for this session. You can use the clock buttons.
MY_SHIFT.LOCATION_HINT: This venue may require GPS near the restaurant for clock actions.
MY_SHIFT.ERR_QR: Scan the venue QR above, or open the staff link from your manager.
MY_SHIFT.ERR_QR_BREAK: Scan the venue QR code to end your break.
MY_SHIFT.ERR_LOCATION: Allow location access so we can verify you are at the venue.
MY_SHIFT.OVERTIME_BODY: You have been clocked in for more than the usual {{hours}} hours. If you are still working, coordinate overtime with your manager and clock out when you finish.

REPORTS.TITLE: Sales & Revenue
REPORTS.SUBTITLE: Revenue analysis from paid orders
REPORTS.NO_DATA_DESC: Paid or completed orders in the selected range will appear here.
REPORTS.WORK_SESSIONS_HINT: This table uses the From / To dates and Refresh in the header (same range as sales). Rows are grouped by UTC calendar day from clock-in time. IP addresses are from the server’s view (useful when staff should use on-site Wi‑Fi).
REPORTS.WORK_SESSIONS_EMPTY: No clock-in records in this period.
REPORTS.WORK_SESSIONS_LIVE_EMPTY: Nobody is clocked in right now.
REPORTS.WORK_SESSION_ADJUST_END_HINT: Leave empty if the shift is still open. Times use your device’s local timezone; the server stores UTC.
REPORTS.WORK_SESSION_ADJUST_INVALID_START: Enter a valid clock-in date and time.
REPORTS.WORK_SESSION_ADJUST_INVALID_END: Enter a valid clock-out date and time, or clear the field for an open shift.
REPORTS.WORK_SESSION_ADJUST_INVALID_RANGE: Clock out must be on or after clock in.
REPORTS.WORK_SESSION_ADJUST_ERROR: Could not save this adjustment. Check the values and try again.
REPORTS.ATTENDANCE_EXCEL_HINT: Download a timesheet for one calendar month: one row per work session (UTC start). Optional employee numbers appear when set on user profiles.
REPORTS.ATTENDANCE_EXCEL_STAFF_FILTER_HINT: Open the list to choose people. Leave none selected to include everyone with attendance that month.
REPORTS.ATTENDANCE_EXCEL_NO_DATA: No attendance records for that month.
REPORTS.ATTENDANCE_EXCEL_ERROR: Could not download the attendance export. Try again.
REPORTS.ATTENDANCE_REGISTRO_HORARIO_HINT: Spanish «registro horario» (.xlsx): paper-style monthly grid (planned vs clocked, signature column). One sheet per employee. Uses tenant timezone and optional CIF/CCC from settings.
REPORTS.ATTENDANCE_REGISTRO_HORARIO_NO_DATA: No staff with attendance in that month (or no records). Select staff or clock time first.
REPORTS.ATTENDANCE_REGISTRO_HORARIO_ERROR: Could not download the registro horario export. Try again.

TABLES.TITLE: Tables
TABLES.JOIN_HINT: Drag onto another table until it highlights; hold ~1s overlap, then release to join (tables snap back if you cancel). Desktop: Ctrl+click (⌘+click) to multi-select.
TABLES.LAYOUT_OVERLAP_HINT: Overlapping tables on this floor: {{names}}. Drag them apart so each table is visible.
TABLES.JOIN_TABLES_CONFIRM_MESSAGE: Join {{tableA}} and {{tableB}}? They will share one group for reservations until unjoined.
TABLES.LEAVE_UNSAVED_LAYOUT: The floor layout could not be saved. Leave this page anyway? Unsaved table positions will be lost.
TABLES.NAME: Name
TABLES.DELETE_FLOOR_CONFIRM: Delete this floor? Tables will be unassigned.
TABLES.CREATE_FIRST_FLOOR_DESC: Start by adding a floor to design your restaurant layout
TABLES.DELETE_TABLE_CONFIRM: Are you sure you want to delete this table?
TABLES.REASSIGN_AND_DELETE_MESSAGE: This table has orders. Choose another table to move its orders and reservations to, then the table will be deleted.
TABLES.CLOSE_TABLE_CONFIRM: Close table "{{name}}"? This will end the current session.
TABLES.GROUP_TILE_MEMBER_HINT: Expand a table row to show its QR code and session actions.
TABLES.GROUP_SIBLING_ACTIVITY_TITLE: Another table in this group is active
TABLES.GROUP_SIBLING_ACTIVITY_MESSAGE: Joined group: {{names}} already has an active session or open order. Prefer using that ticket unless you need a separate one.
TABLES.GROUP_SIBLING_FLOOR_DOT: Another table in this group has an active session or open order

BOOK.TITLE: Book a table
BOOK.VIEW_CANCEL_HINT: You can view or cancel your reservation using the link below. Save this link or the confirmation token.
BOOK.ERROR_INVALID_LINK: Invalid booking link. Please use the link provided by the restaurant.
BOOK.PREPAYMENT_DEFAULT: A pre-payment may be required; it will be discounted from your meal.
BOOK.ARRIVAL_TOLERANCE_MINUTES: Please arrive within {{minutes}} minutes of your booking time.
BOOK.INVALID_PHONE: Enter a valid phone number (including country code if needed).
BOOK.VIEW_LINK_UNAVAILABLE: Open the link from your confirmation email to view or cancel this reservation.
BOOK.WEEK_GRID_HINT: Pick a day in the month, then choose a time below. Light days are free for your party size and service; medium grey means fully booked; pale grey means closed or not bookable. The dark day is your selection. Changing guests or service reloads availability.
BOOK.SAME_DAY_TIME_HINT: Only upcoming times are shown for today.
BOOK.PICK_SLOT: Please choose an available time slot.
BOOK.SLOT_UNAVAILABLE: That time is no longer available. Pick another available slot.
BOOK.ALLERGIES_DETAIL_REQUIRED: Please describe allergies when you indicate allergies.
BOOK.NO_ZONE_FOR_SEATING: No seating area matches this preference. Choose another option or contact the restaurant.

FEEDBACK.TITLE: How was your visit?
FEEDBACK.INTRO: We would love to hear from you. Your rating and comments help us improve.
FEEDBACK.COMMENT_PLACEHOLDER: Tell us what went well or what we could do better
FEEDBACK.CONTACT_HINT: Leave your name, email or phone if you would like us to follow up.
FEEDBACK.SUBMIT_ERROR: Could not send feedback. Please try again later.
FEEDBACK.VALIDATION_ERROR: Please check your input and try again.
FEEDBACK.RATE_LIMIT: Too many submissions. Please try again in a little while.
FEEDBACK.THANK_YOU_DETAIL: We appreciate you taking the time to share your feedback.
FEEDBACK.OPEN_GOOGLE_REVIEW: Leave a public review on Google
FEEDBACK.QR_CARD_HINT: Guests scan this code to open your public feedback form. Use Print QR for a clean page to put on tables or near the register.

RESERVATIONS.TITLE: Reservations
RESERVATIONS.CLIENT_NOTES_PLACEHOLDER: e.g. dietary requirements, high chair, outdoor seating
RESERVATIONS.RESERVATION_NOTES_PLACEHOLDER: e.g. We will arrive with a baby stroller
RESERVATIONS.MODAL_DATE_TIME_HINT: Same details as the public booking page: pick date and time, party size, then contact fields. Staff use calendar/time inputs here; guests use the week grid on /book.
RESERVATIONS.PREFILL_NONE: No previous reservation found for this phone.
RESERVATIONS.NO_AVAILABLE_TABLES: No available tables for this party size.
RESERVATIONS.CANCEL_CONFIRM_MESSAGE: Are you sure you want to cancel this reservation?
RESERVATIONS.NO_SHOW_CONFIRM_MESSAGE: The guest did not show up. This will free the table and record the no-show.
RESERVATIONS.REMINDER_SENT_EMAIL_AND_WHATSAPP: Reminder sent by email and WhatsApp
RESERVATIONS.ERROR_DATE_TIME_REQUIRED: Please choose a date and time.
RESERVATIONS.ERROR_PARTY_SIZE_RANGE: Party size must be between 1 and 20.
RESERVATIONS.ERROR_MISSING_TOKEN: Missing reservation token. Use the link from your confirmation.
RESERVATIONS.ERROR_NOT_FOUND: Reservation not found or link expired.
RESERVATIONS.UPCOMING_NO_TABLE: You have {{count}} upcoming reservation(s) today with no table assigned.
RESERVATIONS.TABLE_UPCOMING: Table {{table}} has an upcoming reservation at {{time}} ({{name}}). Seat here anyway?
RESERVATIONS.ARRIVAL_TOLERANCE_MINUTES: Please arrive within {{minutes}} minutes of your booking time.
RESERVATIONS.NOTIFY_DELAY: Notify us if you will be late
RESERVATIONS.NOTIFY_DELAY_PLACEHOLDER: e.g. We will arrive 1 hour late
RESERVATIONS.DELAY_SENT: Delay notice sent. We will be informed.
RESERVATIONS.DELAY_RATE_LIMITED: Too many delay notices were sent. Please try again later.

WORKING_PLAN.TITLE: Working plan
WORKING_PLAN.CALENDAR_LEGEND: Gray = closed day. Red = staffing issue. Green = matches required headcount. Each shift line is colored by team member. Shifts are listed under each date.
WORKING_PLAN.NO_SHIFTS: No shifts in this period. Add a shift to build your working plan.
WORKING_PLAN.SPLIT_ERR_ORDER: The second block must start after the first block ends.
WORKING_PLAN.SPLIT_ERR_BLOCK2_TIMES: Second block: start must be before end.
WORKING_PLAN.SPLIT_ERR_NO_ROOM: No time left the same day after the first block. Shorten block A or use “Use any hour”.
WORKING_PLAN.SPLIT_ROLLBACK_FAILED: Could not save the second block; the first block was removed, but cleanup failed. Please review the schedule.
WORKING_PLAN.LABEL: Label
WORKING_PLAN.DELETE_CONFIRM: Remove this shift from the schedule?
WORKING_PLAN.STAFF_FILTER_HINT: All staff: compare planned vs clocked for everyone. Select a staff member to filter the table and export that person’s shifts for {{month}} to Excel.
WORKING_PLAN.EXPORT_NO_STAFF_HINT: Add team accounts with owner, admin, kitchen, bar, waiter, or receptionist roles to choose a worker and export.
WORKING_PLAN.BULK_MONTH_SCOPE: Target calendar month: {{month}} (same rules as Excel export — calendar month in calendar view, or the month of the week range in week view).
WORKING_PLAN.BULK_SKIP_EXISTING: Skip days that already have a shift for this person
WORKING_PLAN.BULK_SKIP_EXISTING_HINT: Preserves one-off edits and rotations. Turn off to add an extra shift on those days too.
WORKING_PLAN.BULK_DONE: Added {{created}} shift(s). Skipped {{skipped}} day(s) that already had a shift.
WORKING_PLAN.BULK_ERR_TIMES: Start time must be before end time.
WORKING_PLAN.COPY_WEEK_DONE: Copied {{created}} shift(s). Skipped {{skipped}} day(s) that already had a shift.
WORKING_PLAN.PLANNED_VS_ACTUAL_HINT: Planned = working plan. Clocked = net time from attendance (UTC day by clock-in). Positive variance = more clocked than planned.
WORKING_PLAN.PVA_EMPTY_FILTERED: No planned or clocked time for this staff member in this period.
WORKING_PLAN.EXPORT_PVA_FAILED: Could not export planned vs clocked.

SETTINGS.TITLE: Settings
SETTINGS.SUBTITLE: Manage your business information and branding
SETTINGS.UI_MODULES_HINT: Turn off areas your team does not use. They disappear from the sidebar and dashboard; opening a direct link sends users to the dashboard. You can re-enable any module here anytime.
SETTINGS.UI_MODULE_TABLES_DESC: Table map, seating, and canvas editor.
SETTINGS.UI_MODULE_PROVIDERS_DESC: Browse and import products from linked providers.
SETTINGS.UI_MODULE_RESERVATIONS_DESC: Reservation list and guest feedback inbox.
SETTINGS.UI_MODULE_KITCHEN_BAR_DESC: KDS-style order displays for kitchen and beverages.
SETTINGS.UPLOAD_LOGO_HINT: Recommended: Square image, max 2MB (JPG, PNG, WebP, AVIF, SVG)
SETTINGS.HEADER_BACKGROUND_HINT: Image for the hero header on book, menu and reservation pages. JPG, PNG, WebP or AVIF.
SETTINGS.DESCRIPTION_PLACEHOLDER: A brief description of your business...
SETTINGS.PUBLIC_BACKGROUND_COLOR_HINT: Background color for book, menu and reservation pages. Use hex (e.g. #1E22AA) or the preset.
SETTINGS.TIMEZONE_NOT_SET: No timezone configured. UTC will be used for reservation time validation.
SETTINGS.COUNTRY_CODE_HINT: Optional two-letter code (e.g. ES, IN) to rank suggested contract templates. Leave empty to infer from currency, tax id, or timezone where possible.
SETTINGS.CONTACT_INFO_SUBTITLE: How customers can reach your business
SETTINGS.PUBLIC_GOOGLE_REVIEW_DESCRIPTION: Add a link so guests can leave a public review on Google after they submit their private feedback.
SETTINGS.PUBLIC_GOOGLE_REVIEW_INSTRUCTIONS: Navigate to https://developers.google.com/maps/documentation/javascript/examples/places-placeid-finder in your browser, then copy and paste your place's Place ID below.
SETTINGS.PUBLIC_GOOGLE_REVIEW_PLACEHOLDER: https://g.page/.../review or Google Maps review URL
SETTINGS.PUBLIC_GOOGLE_REVIEW_HINT: Shown on the thank-you page after guests submit private feedback so they can leave a public Google review.
SETTINGS.PUBLIC_GOOGLE_MAPS_PLACEHOLDER: https://maps.app.goo.gl/... or Share link from Google Maps
SETTINGS.PUBLIC_GOOGLE_MAPS_HINT: Optional. Shown on the booking page, reservation view, and feedback page so guests can open your location in Google Maps. Use Share → Copy link from your Business Profile or Maps listing (not the same as the review link).
SETTINGS.PUBLIC_OPENSTREETMAP_HINT: Optional. Same places as the Google Maps link, for guests who prefer OpenStreetMap. Paste the URL from the Share button on openstreetmap.org.
SETTINGS.PUBLIC_TERMS_OF_SERVICE_HINT: Optional. Shown on public pages (book, feedback). If empty, the server default from config (PUBLIC_TERMS_OF_SERVICE_URL) is used when set.
SETTINGS.PUBLIC_PRIVACY_POLICY_HINT: Optional. Same behavior as terms of service (fallback: PUBLIC_PRIVACY_POLICY_URL in server config).
SETTINGS.CCC_HINT: Optional. Spanish Código Cuenta de Cotización — shown on the registro horario Excel export.
SETTINGS.DEFAULT_TAX_HINT: Applied to products unless overridden per product.
SETTINGS.TAXES_SUBTITLE: Manage tax rates and validity periods. Prices are tax-inclusive.
SETTINGS.KITCHEN_STATIONS_SUBTITLE: Define stations (e.g. grill, cold, desserts, bar) and map products. The kitchen and bar displays can filter by station. Unmapped products use the defaults below by category (food vs beverages).
SETTINGS.DELIVERY_INTEGRATIONS_SUBTITLE: Connect third-party delivery brands. Credentials stay on the server. Map external items to POS products; ingested orders use the same kitchen order flow.
SETTINGS.DELIVERY_INTEGRATIONS_STORE_ID_PH: Set when the brand provides a store id
SETTINGS.DELIVERY_INTEGRATIONS_CREDENTIALS_HINT: Not returned to the browser after save. For the sandbox stub, include api_key. Real OAuth flows will add fields here later.
SETTINGS.DELIVERY_INTEGRATIONS_MAPPINGS_HINT: Map each external item id to a POS product. Unmapped lines are rejected on ingest.
SETTINGS.SOCIAL_POSTS_SUBTITLE: Compose image and caption, connect Meta (Facebook Page / Instagram Business), publish now or schedule. OAuth tokens stay on the server.
SETTINGS.SOCIAL_POSTS_IG_LINKED: Instagram Business is linked to this Page.
SETTINGS.SOCIAL_POSTS_IG_NOT_LINKED: No Instagram Business account linked to the Page (only Facebook Page posting available).
SETTINGS.SOCIAL_POSTS_FEEDBACK_OAUTH_ERROR: Could not complete Meta login. Check META_APP_ID / redirect URL on the server.
SETTINGS.SOCIAL_POSTS_FEEDBACK_CONFIGURE: Meta OAuth is not configured or the server returned an error.
SETTINGS.SOCIAL_POSTS_SECTION_CONNECTIONS_DESC: Link Meta to publish to your Facebook Page and Instagram Business account.
SETTINGS.SOCIAL_POSTS_SECTION_COMPOSE_DESC: Add an image and caption, choose channels, then publish immediately or pick a date and time.
SETTINGS.SOCIAL_POSTS_IMAGE_HINT: JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF. A preview appears after you choose a file.
SETTINGS.SOCIAL_POSTS_CAPTION_HINT: Optional. Shown with the image on each channel you select.
SETTINGS.SOCIAL_POSTS_CHANNELS_HINT: Pick at least one channel. Instagram requires Business linked to your Page.
SETTINGS.SOCIAL_POSTS_SCHEDULE_HINT: Pick a future date and time in your device’s local timezone.
SETTINGS.SOCIAL_POSTS_SUBMIT_DISABLED_HINT: Connect Meta, attach an image, select at least one channel, and set a schedule when not publishing immediately.
SETTINGS.CONTRACT_TEMPLATES_SUBTITLE: Create reusable contract texts for printing and signatures. When creating a staff contract, pick a template so its key is stored on the contract.
SETTINGS.CONTRACT_TEMPLATES_PLACEHOLDERS: In the body, use placeholders like employer_name, worker_name, role_title, start_date, end_date, compensation_summary, payment_terms, jurisdiction_note, kind, payment_structure, contract_version, contract_status, employer_address, employer_email, employer_tax_id — each wrapped in double curly braces.
SETTINGS.CONTRACT_TEMPLATES_KEY_HINT: Letters, digits, underscore, hyphen; 1–64 characters; unique per restaurant.
SETTINGS.CONTRACT_TEMPLATES_LOCALE_HINT: Optional BCP 47 tag (e.g. es, en, en-IN). Shown on templates and copied from presets.
SETTINGS.CONTRACT_TEMPLATES_PRESETS_SUBTITLE: System templates by region and language. Import copies into your restaurant’s list; you can edit afterward. Set country in Business profile for better ranking.
SETTINGS.CONTRACT_TEMPLATES_PRESETS_EMPTY: No catalog templates are available (run database migrations).
SETTINGS.CONFIRM_DELETE_TAX: Delete this tax? Products using it will fall back to default tax.
SETTINGS.PROVIDERS_SUBTITLE: Add your own suppliers and link products (e.g. supplies not on the menu).
SETTINGS.OPENING_HOURS_SUBTITLE: Set your business hours for each day of the week
SETTINGS.OPENING_HOURS_HINT: Set your business hours for each day of the week. You can add a break between shifts.
SETTINGS.OPENING_HOURS_PLANNED_HELP: Schedule a new weekly pattern from a future date, or add closed days and alternate hours for date ranges. Public booking and reservations follow these rules automatically.
SETTINGS.OPENING_HOURS_BASELINE_HINT: Uses the hours from the grid above. Availability switches to this pattern starting on the chosen date.
SETTINGS.OPENING_HOURS_EFFECTIVE_FROM_REQUIRED: Choose an effective date for the scheduled pattern.
SETTINGS.OPENING_HOURS_OVERRIDE_HINT: Closed: block reservations for the range. Alternate hours: uses the grid above as the weekly template for days in the range.
SETTINGS.OPENING_HOURS_DATES_REQUIRED: Choose both start and end dates.
SETTINGS.CURRENCY_HINT: ISO 4217 code for prices (products, menu, orders, reports). Use the code your payment provider expects (e.g. EUR, USD, MXN).
SETTINGS.LANGUAGE_HINT: Applies to public menu and admin UI by default.
SETTINGS.STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_HINT: Your Stripe publishable key (starts with pk_test_ or pk_live_)
SETTINGS.STRIPE_SECRET_PLACEHOLDER: sk_test_... or leave blank to keep current
SETTINGS.STRIPE_SECRET_HINT: Your Stripe secret key (starts with sk_test_ or sk_live_). Leave blank to keep current value.
SETTINGS.REVOLUT_MERCHANT_SECRET_HINT: Merchant secret from Revolut Business. Leave blank to keep current. Enables Pay with Revolut on the customer menu.
SETTINGS.FISCAL_INVOICING_DESC: When enabled, printing a Factura requests a server-issued fiscal record and adds QR code and mandatory disclaimer text. AEAT submission is not performed until wired per official technical documentation.
SETTINGS.FISCAL_MODE_TEST: Test — stub issuance, no AEAT HTTP call
SETTINGS.FISCAL_SERIES_HINT: Prefix for sequential fiscal numbers (e.g. VF). The next number is allocated on the server when an invoice is issued.
SETTINGS.FISCAL_AEAT_SECRET_HINT: Reserved for a future AEAT integration. Leave blank to keep the current value.
SETTINGS.IMMEDIATE_PAYMENT_HINT: When enabled, customers must pay to place an order.
SETTINGS.TIP_PRESETS_HINT: Up to four percentages shown when staff marks an order paid (e.g. 5, 10, 15, 20). Set all to zero to hide tips.
SETTINGS.TIP_TAX_RATE_HINT: Used only on printed invoices to split the tip into net and VAT (0 = no VAT on tip). Menu prices stay tax-inclusive.
SETTINGS.TIP_ENTRY_MODE_HINT: Preset mode shows percentage buttons when marking paid. Overpayment mode asks for the total charged and sets tip to the difference after subtotal (adjustable before confirming).
SETTINGS.TRANSLATIONS_SUBTITLE: Manage translations for your menu and business information
SETTINGS.DATA_EXPORT_DESC: ZIP file with JSON: business settings, staff (no passwords), menu, orders, reservations, translations, and inventory. Payment and SMTP secrets are redacted in the export.
SETTINGS.DATA_EXPORT_FAILED: Could not build the export. Please try again.
SETTINGS.DANGER_ZONE_DESC: Deleting your restaurant removes all orders, reservations, staff accounts, uploaded images, and related data. This cannot be undone.
SETTINGS.PURGE_CONFIRM_LABEL: Type your business name exactly to confirm
SETTINGS.PURGE_FAILED: Could not delete the restaurant. Check the name matches exactly.
SETTINGS.SECURITY_SUBTITLE: Optional two-factor authentication (OTP) for your account
SETTINGS.OTP_DESCRIPTION: Add an extra layer of security by requiring a one-time code from an authenticator app (e.g. Google Authenticator) when signing in.
SETTINGS.OTP_SCAN_OR_ENTER: Add this key to your authenticator app
SETTINGS.OTP_ADD_TO_APP: Open Google Authenticator or another TOTP app and add this secret key (or scan the QR code if your app supports it).
SETTINGS.OTP_ENTER_CODE: Enter the 6-digit code from your app to enable
SETTINGS.OTP_ENABLED: Two-factor authentication (OTP) is enabled. You will need to enter a code from your authenticator app when signing in.
SETTINGS.OTP_DISABLE_ENTER_CODE: Enter your current OTP code to disable
SETTINGS.LOCATION_VERIFICATION_DESC: Set the restaurant venue coordinates and radius below. The same point flags orders placed outside the area and, when enabled under Staff clock-in QR, verifies staff GPS at clock-in.
SETTINGS.ENABLE_LOCATION_CHECK_HINT: Orders outside this radius are flagged. Staff clock-in location checks, if enabled, use the same center and radius.
SETTINGS.LOCATION_RADIUS_HINT: Orders outside this radius will be flagged
SETTINGS.CLOCK_QR_DESC: Generate a secret token for printed QR codes. When active, staff must scan or use a link with this token for clock-in, end shift, and ending breaks.
SETTINGS.CLOCK_QR_OFF: QR is not required; staff can use clock buttons without scanning.
SETTINGS.CLOCK_QR_URL_HINT: Example path for links: /my-shift?clock_qr=YOUR_TOKEN (use your real app URL).
SETTINGS.CLOCK_QR_DOWNLOAD_FAILED: Could not generate the QR image. Try again or copy the token and use an external QR tool.
SETTINGS.CLOCK_QR_LOCATION_VERIFY: Require GPS at venue for clock
SETTINGS.CLOCK_QR_LOCATION_VERIFY_HINT: When on, clock actions use the same latitude, longitude, and radius as Location verification on this page—one shared venue pin for ordering checks and clock-in.
SETTINGS.CLOCK_QR_LEGACY_REGENERATE_HINT: This QR was created before persistent download was available. Generate a new token to enable copy, download, and reload-safe access.
SETTINGS.RESERVATIONS_SUBTITLE: Pre-payment, policies and reminders for table reservations
SETTINGS.PREPAYMENT_WHOLE_AMOUNT_LABEL: Amount (this currency has no fractional unit in the POS)
SETTINGS.RESERVATION_PREPAYMENT_HINT: Charged when the customer confirms the reservation. Enter the whole amount and the minor part separately (e.g. euros and cents). Stored in the smallest currency unit, like menu prices. Set both to 0 to disable. Currency is chosen under Payment settings.
SETTINGS.RESERVATION_PREPAYMENT_TEXT_PLACEHOLDER: Optional text shown to customers (e.g. This amount is discounted from your meal.)
SETTINGS.RESERVATION_PREPAYMENT_TEXT_HINT: Shown on the booking page when pre-payment is set.
SETTINGS.RESERVATION_CANCELLATION_POLICY_PLACEHOL: e.g. Free cancellation up to 24h before. Later cancellations may be charged.
SETTINGS.RESERVATION_ARRIVAL_TOLERANCE_HINT: How long we hold the table after the booked time (e.g. 15).
SETTINGS.RESERVATION_AVG_TABLE_TURN_HINT: Typical time a party occupies a table after seating. Used to plan when that table can be booked again. Leave empty to use a simple same-day block (no turn window).
SETTINGS.RESERVATION_SLOT_MINUTES_HINT: Interval between offered start times on the public booking grid (e.g. 15 or 30). Leave empty or 0 for 15-minute steps.
SETTINGS.RESERVATION_MAX_GUESTS_PER_SLOT_HINT: Caps total guests that can book the same start time (in addition to table capacity). Leave empty for no extra limit.
SETTINGS.RESERVATION_WALK_IN_TABLES_HINT: Number of tables kept out of online reservation capacity so you can seat walk-in guests. Smallest tables are withheld first.
SETTINGS.REMINDER_SCHEDULE_DESC: Choose which reminders to send before a reservation. Use “Send reminder” from the reservations list, or set up a cron job to automate.
SETTINGS.RESERVATION_REMINDER_24H_HINT: When enabled, a reminder can be sent (manually or via automation) one day before the booking.
SETTINGS.RESERVATION_REMINDER_2H_HINT: When enabled, a reminder can be sent (manually or via automation) two hours before the booking.
SETTINGS.EMAIL_SETTINGS_SUBTITLE: Configure SMTP for transactional emails (e.g. reservation confirmations). Leave empty to use the global server configuration.
SETTINGS.RESERVATION_CONFIRMATION_EMAIL_DESC: Write the email in plain text. Insert values by wrapping an allowed name in double curly braces (for example customer_name). Only those names are filled in—no code or scripts. Leave blank to use the built-in default.
SETTINGS.RESERVATION_CONFIRMATION_SUBJECT_PLACEHO: e.g. We have reserved a table for you
SETTINGS.RESERVATION_CONFIRMATION_BODY_HINT: Allowed names (wrap each in double curly braces): restaurant_name, customer_name, date, time, party_size, reservation_url, reservation_link_block_html (clickable link in HTML emails; empty if there is no self-service link), cancellation_policy, prepayment_text, prepayment_notice, dress_code, arrival_note, restaurant_phone, restaurant_email, restaurant_contact_block_html (phone and email block with tel/mailto in HTML and plain lines in text; empty if both phone and email are unset), google_maps_link_block_html, openstreetmap_link_block_html (map links when those URLs are set in Contact info; empty otherwise). Use cancellation_policy and similar to pull text from the Reservations settings section.
SETTINGS.PUBLIC_GOOGLE_REVIEW_URL_HINT: Paste the Google Place ID (e.g., 0x...) from Google Place ID Finder: https://developers.google.com/maps/documentation/javascript/examples/places-placeid-finder . The app will auto-generate your review URL: https://search.google.com/local/writereview?placeid=YOUR-ID.

PAYMENTS.HOW_TO_PAY: How would you like to pay?
PAYMENTS.PAY_ONLINE_DESC: Pay securely with your card now
PAYMENTS.PAY_WITH_REVOLUT_DESC: Pay via Revolut (card, Revolut Pay, etc.)
PAYMENTS.SUCCESS_MESSAGE: Thank you. Your payment has been received.
PAYMENTS.PAY_CARD_TERMINAL_DESC: A waiter will bring the card terminal
PAYMENTS.PAY_CASH_DESC: A waiter will come to collect payment
PAYMENTS.CALL_WAITER_DESC: Need help or have a question?
PAYMENTS.WAITER_CALLED_WAIT: Waiter has been called, please wait...
PAYMENTS.MESSAGE_HINT: Add an optional note for the staff (e.g. questions, observations).
PAYMENTS.WAITER_ON_WAY_DESC: A member of staff will be with you shortly.
PAYMENTS.PAYMENT_REQUESTED_DESC: A waiter will come to your table to process the payment.

ERRORS.GENERIC: Something went wrong. Please try again.
ERRORS.FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission to do this
ERRORS.NETWORK: Network error. Please check your connection.

ITEMS.TITLE: Inventory Items
ITEMS.NO_ITEMS_DESC: Add your first item to start tracking inventory
ITEMS.NAME: Name
ITEMS.DELETE_CONFIRM: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"

SUPPLIERS.TITLE: Suppliers
SUPPLIERS.NO_SUPPLIERS_DESC: Add your first supplier to get started
SUPPLIERS.NAME: Name
SUPPLIERS.DELETE_CONFIRM: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"

PURCHASE_ORDERS.TITLE: Purchase Orders
PURCHASE_ORDERS.NO_ORDERS_DESC: Create your first purchase order to get started
PURCHASE_ORDERS.NO_ITEMS: No items added yet. Click "Add Item" to start.
PURCHASE_ORDERS.ENTER_QUANTITY_ERROR: Enter at least one quantity to receive.
PURCHASE_ORDERS.STATUS_UPDATE_ERROR: Failed to update purchase order status.
PURCHASE_ORDERS.STATUS_HELP_DRAFT: The order is still being prepared and has not been sent to the supplier.
PURCHASE_ORDERS.STATUS_HELP_SUBMITTED: The order has been submitted for review or sent to the supplier.
PURCHASE_ORDERS.STATUS_HELP_APPROVED: The order is approved and ready for goods to be received.
PURCHASE_ORDERS.STATUS_HELP_PARTIALLY_RECEIVED: Some quantities have been received; more goods may still arrive.
PURCHASE_ORDERS.STATUS_HELP_RECEIVED: All ordered quantities have been received in full.
PURCHASE_ORDERS.STATUS_HELP_CANCELLED: The order will not be fulfilled; no further receiving is expected.
PURCHASE_ORDERS.RECEIVE_PARTIAL_HINT: Receiving less than the ordered quantity sets the order to Partially Received until every line is fully received.

CONTRACTS.TITLE: Staff contracts
CONTRACTS.INTRO: Create and track employment and freelancer agreements. Signed PDFs are stored per tenant and only accessible to authorized staff.
CONTRACTS.SUBJECT: Staff member

USERS.TITLE: User Management
USERS.CO_OWNER_HINT: Owners can assign the Owner role to another staff member (shared ownership). New accounts cannot be created as owner from here.
USERS.YOUR_CURRENT_PASSWORD_HINT: Enter the password you use to sign in. Required to authorize changing another user's password.
USERS.YOUR_CURRENT_PASSWORD_REQUIRED: Enter your current password to set a new password.
USERS.DELETE_CONFIRM_MESSAGE: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.
USERS.ADD_SUPPORT_ACCESS_HINT: Set a temporary password and share it securely with Satisfecho support. Remove or change this user when support access is no longer needed.
USERS.SUPPORT_EDIT_EXISTING_HINT: Satisfecho support access is already enabled. Update the password or remove this user when access is no longer needed.

PRICING.TITLE: Pricing helper
PRICING.TOTAL_PROFIT_IF_SOLD_OUT: Total profit if container sold out
PRICING.NO_COST_BASIS: No cost basis available for this product.
PRICING.SIMULATE_INVALID: Enter a valid container price and quantities.
PRICING.EXAMPLE_LINE: Example: a €50 container, 200 ml servings, and 25% pour cost suggest about €3.13 per serving.
PRICING.MODE_RECIPE_HINT: Uses this product's recipe cost and linked inventory units.
PRICING.MODE_SIMULATE_HINT: Enter container price and sizes when recipe cost is not set yet.
PRICING.CONTAINER_TOTAL_HINT: What you paid for the full container (keg, bottle, or case).
PRICING.CONTAINER_AMOUNT_HINT: Total volume or count in the container (e.g. 20 liters).
PRICING.SERVING_SIZE_HINT: Amount per menu item (e.g. 200 ml per glass); pick the matching unit.
PRICING.TARGET_POUR_COST_HINT: Pour cost is ingredient cost divided by menu price. Lower % means higher margin (25% is common for beverages).
PRICING.TARGET_MARGIN_HINT: Margin is profit divided by menu price. 35% margin keeps about one-third of the price as profit after COGS.
PRICING.TARGET_MARKUP_HINT: Markup is profit divided by cost. 50% markup means the price is 150% of ingredient cost.
PRICING.STRATEGY_INFO: Choose how to set the goal percentage. Pour cost suits bar inventory; margin or markup suit food and retail.
PRICING.WASTE_PCT_HINT: Extra loss from spillage, foam, or trim, added to cost per serving.
PRICING.EXTRA_FIXED_COST_HINT: Per-serving add-ons not in the recipe (garnish, to-go cup, etc.).
PRICING.ROUNDING_HINT: Round the suggested price to the nearest step (e.g. 0.50).
